---
name: Bug report
about: Report an error in the workbook, documentation, or demo
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## What's wrong

A clear description of the bug (e.g., a wrong rubric anchor, a broken link,
a CSV column mismatch, an incorrect benchmark attribution).

## Where

- File / path:
- Sheet / row / column (if in workbook):
- URL (if a broken link):

## What it should be

Your suggested correction, with a textual citation if applicable.
